text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our day out, Tokai Teio seems to be worrying
over something.
choice_data_list: Something the matter?
Something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well... The thing is, Prez gave me an assignment...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I really am a genius! ♪ Another scrimmage in the
bag!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Since enrolling here, I've been whittling down my
times. If I just keep this up...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna reach Monarch status faster than I
thought! Don't you think so too, Prez?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you keep this up? ...Fail to grasp the true
reality of your situation, and that momentum will
one day fade.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You still have a long way to go... The road to the
top is far longer and harder than you imagine.
You have much left to learn.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you truly seek to become stronger, then... Let's
see, now. How about I give you an assignment?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And then she told me to figure out "what my
trainer means to me."
choice_data_list: I'd be happy to help!
I'd be happy to help!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Really?! Okay then, I know just the place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She drags me to an amusement park. When I ask
her why we're here...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
We've never visited anywhere like this together,
right? So I might be able to learn new stuff about
you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It should be perfect for Prez's assignment.
choice_data_list: Nice idea.
Nice idea.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Right? Okay, let's head straight for the
go-karts! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yippee! ♪ Who's number one? I'm number one!
choice_data_list:
Even in a go-kart, you leave everyone in your
dust.

Even in a go-kart, you leave everyone in your
dust.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Mwahaha! I could win any race in my sleep!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You need to aim the arcade gun at the screen and
hit the carrots that pop up!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Just follow my example! ...Pew, pew, pew! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You see?
choice_data_list: Wow! You hit all of them!
Wow! You hit all of them!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's right! No one holds a candle to my
shooting skills!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We go around trying each attraction and, before
we know it, the sun has already begun to set.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... That was so much fun! ♪ So Trainer, do
you understand my prowess now?
choice_data_list: You're great at everything!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: That's right! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Aww, if we had a little more time, I'd show you
even more of my amazing techniques.
choice_data_list: Let's save it for another day.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Let's do this again! I had so much fun
hanging out with you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You even give me compliments just like in
practice! Gets me all fired up!
choice_data_list: You're always so much fun. They just slip out.
You're always so much fun. They just slip out.
You never fail to amaze. They just slip out.
You never fail to amaze. They just slip out.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You even give me compliments just like in
practice! Gets me all fired up!
choice_data_list: You're always so much fun. They just slip out.
You're always so much fun. They just slip out.
You never fail to amaze. They just slip out.
You never fail to amaze. They just slip out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether she's running races or just shining in her
everyday life, Tokai Teio is always making others
smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just one look and she brightens my day. So of
course I want to compliment her. I tell her as
much.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If you keep saying that, you're gonna make me
blush!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ I'll just keep on brightening your days,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: (So in the end, what does my trainer mean to me?)

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
(Someone I can always count on for a
compliment, I guess.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We leave the amusement park in high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's in her races or playing games at an
amusement park, the more Tokai Teio is praised,
the better the show she puts on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I always end up praising her just to see what she's
going to do next. I tell her as much.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Dang! You're more demanding than I thought! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I guess I'm the only person who can live up to
your expectations!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay then! I'll just keep giving you the spectacle
you expect!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: (So in the end, what does my trainer mean to me?)

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
(Someone I can always count on for a
compliment, I guess.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We leave the amusement park in high spirits.
